name: Hermes Routing Maturity Tracker
description: Phase 4 of the vault self-improvement loop. Cloned from the crypto outcome_tracker pattern (Laplace-smoothed Bayesian update kept verbatim). Reads vault qa entries, computes per-(domain, model) success rate from feedback signals, pushes mature (domain, model) pairs into Hermes's in-process maturity table via PUT /v1/routing/maturity. Also writes a routing_maturity summary back to the vault for the next cron pass to compare against.
